name: Rice Chex Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the white syrup, sugar, and peanut butter in a large pot. Heat over medium heat until boiling.
2. Continue to stir the mixture constantly until it reaches a boil. Be careful not to let it burn easily.
3. Add the vanilla extract, Spanish peanuts, and Rice Chex cereal to the boiling mixture. Stir well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Transfer the mixture to a greased 9 x 13 inch baking pan. Press down lightly with a spatula or your hands to ensure an even layer.
5. Allow the bars to cool completely at room temperature before cutting into squares. Do not refrigerate.
